productDisplayName: Crocs Kid's Electro Flip Bubblegum Fuchsia Pink Kidswear
description: CompositionBubblegum pink and fuchsia sandals made of lightweight, form fitting, odour resistant EVA and back strapWash care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washDesigned for utmost style and comfort, this pair of bubblegum pink and fuchsia sandals from crocs is made of lightweight material. The heel strap ensures a secure Fit while the Croslite footbed provides an ergonomic fit. The heel strap has holes to accommodate jibbitz and the midsole band is a tribute to the classic vulcanized style of yesteryear footwear. The speciality of these shoes are that they need to fit loosely around the feet, such that neither the sides of the shoe nor the toe unit come in contact with the feet. Instead, there should be a quarter to half inch gap between the foot and the wall of the shoe, and you should be able to comfortably fit a finger between the heel and back strap.Note: Jibbitz is a company founded by Rich and Sheri Schmeltzer in 2005 to create decorative attachments for the holes in crocs sandals.
